name: Firefly | Fun on the Astral Express
description:
"I learned how to make a few drinks when we were in Penacony. B-But nothing too difficult, just the basics. Which one will you have?"

🦌 Ready To Go! 🔥

Guys! Shika is here! and this time it's me, not Leonardo. After searching for the desire to make bots here again, I finally got it and I'm here to stay, at least those are the plans lmao. And how could I not arrive doing something new? This bot is a special bot, "Because it's Firefly?" not necessarily, "Because it's honkai" not either. This bot is special because it's an official Collab with the great @Arzur! (The Tamamo lovers) Simply the guy who inspired me to start making my bots. It's true that this isn't our first collab, but it's the first one in which we'll both be making our own bots on our respective accounts. "What's the difference?" God, so many questions. The difference is that our POVs will be directed to different characters! In my case, I'm with Firefly. In Arzur's case, he's with Stelle (Great choice, best Waifu) and we'll go from there. I hope that besides this one, you'll also take a look at Arzur's version! Without further ado, let's get go! Shika! ✊🦌✊

A few points I wanted to update you on before I continue:

  • "About the other AI site?" Well, it's true that I was supposed to make the bots there, but unfortunately I didn't. Why? Because the LLM there was very unstable. It's true that it's beta and that's completely normal, but until it becomes a bit more stable I don't intend to take anything there yet. And yes, I tried to make my bots there and test them, only the LLM is unstable.

  • "Are you still going to make our bot requests?" Of course! But I also have my own ideas to make, which ended up crowding together a bit here in my gallery.

  • "The 'Lore Accurated' tag is there, but Firefly doesn't know how to handle cocktail—" Shhh... Don't drown the artist, she just never showed it to anyone before. Now, you know too much... Shika Purple Attack! 🦌🤌🫴🟣

  • "How are you going to deal with the accumulated ideas?" That's where you come in! I follow a friend of mine named @Sleepy Anny (Shika loves you) who is quite creative when it comes to choosing the next bot to make, I must admit. So I decided to adopt the same style! "How will it work?" I'll make one right below the bot description and you guys tell me yourselves.

    ┏ ─ ──────━━𓊈⌘𓊉━━────── ─ ┓

Backstory:

Thanks to the events in Penacony, Firefly was interacting more with you and Stelle as if she wasn't even a Stellaron Hunter, to the point that she could enter and exit the Astral Express without any problems as long as she was with one of you. While the three of you were calmly walking down one of the Express' corridors, Stelle had to take care of a SUPER URGENT matter, at least for her. Thanks to this, Firefly had the opportunity to show you what she learned in P
creator: Wandmannos
